name: kadlekai-mcp
description: Kadlekai time tracking MCP server integration for Claude Code with automatic activity tracking

postInstall.message:
✅ Kadlekai MCP plugin installed!

🎉 NEW: Automatic activity tracking is now enabled!
Your Claude Code activity is captured automatically. Just work normally and run /time:reconcile at end of day.

📋 Next steps:
1. Run /time:setup to configure (choose Global or Project-only scope)
2. Work normally - activity is tracked automatically!
3. End of day: /time:reconcile to create time entries

Available commands:
• /time:setup - Interactive setup wizard (Global or Project-only)
• /time:reconcile - Auto-create entries from activity
• /time:activity - View captured activity
• /time:start - Manual timer start
• /time:stop - Stop timer
• /time:status - Check status
• /time:report - Generate reports
• /time:plugin-update - Update plugin to latest version

Activity log: ~/.kadlekai/activity.jsonl
